require(\"./mse\");\nexports.default = mse_1.default;\n//# sourceMappingURL=index.js.map\n```\n\nThis code is a minimal module that:\n- Enforces strict mode.\n- Defines the module's exports.\n- Imports the default export from `./mse`.\n- Re-exports that default as its own default export.\n- Includes a source map comment.\n\n---\n\n### Step 1: Are the reported issues present in the
